text.message: If I leave 6 3 11 are you taking it?
I was thinking 10 9 11 into the wood
i think were in trouble if u let blue get 6 3 11
but sure take what you want
It’s gonna be pretty tough for me to city tbh with no 3:1
we can all see your wood port lol
Yea I don’t think I’m the biggest treat tbh
I think you are but that’s just my opinion
black i can try to help you pop and maybe u try to help me w road?
i have wood if you need
if i ever get road mats then maybe we can work something out lol
So that basically locks road for green, I don’t have the space long term…
So green getting road and army?
With what space I’m capped at 7
careful red doesnt swoop in for road
you have every road mat tile on the board and enough room
you can easily double play ere
